name: Aberdeen Group Disk Storage Usage Questionnaire (v1)
description: First version of the Aberdeen Group telephone survey questionnaire developed for the Maxtor RAMP project measuring enterprise disk storage usage patterns and receptivity to a midline ATA storage tier. The 28-question instrument covers total disk capacity, utilization, architecture breakdown (internal DAS / external DAS / SAN / NAS), OS platform distribution, redundancy schemes (RAID / mirroring / snapshot / remote copy / tape), cold data identification, technology willingness assessment, backup window issues, and terminology awareness. A demographic section captures company scope, job titles, revenues, IT budget, CIO reporting structure, and industry vertical. This v1 instrument was subsequently refined into Maxtor Survey v2.

creator.name: Peter S. Kastner; David Hill (Aberdeen Group)
